info.title: AutoSend API
info.description: AutoSend REST API for managing organization projects. These endpoints require an organization admin API key (ASA_ prefix) and are not accessible via standard project API keys.

get.description: Retrieves all projects for the authenticated organization. Requires an organization admin API key (ASA_ prefix).

post.description: Creates a new project under the organization. The number of projects is limited by the organization's plan. Requires an organization admin API key (ASA_ prefix).

delete.description: Soft-deletes a project by its ID. The project must belong to the organization. Requires an organization admin API key (ASA_ prefix). No OTP verification is required for admin API key callers.
